meta.title: KBC Yachting — Luxury brokerage, Gulf of Saint-Tropez
meta.description: Sales and charter of yachts, boats and exceptional properties on the French Riviera. Port-Grimaud.

home.categoriesSubtitle: Yachts, boats and residences chosen with the same discretion.
home.featuredSubtitle: A current selection from our portfolio.
home.whySubtitle: A family house rooted in Port-Grimaud, serving a discerning clientele.
home.pillar1Text: Based in the Gulf of Saint-Tropez, we know every cove, berth and address.
home.pillar2Text: From first viewing to navigation title registration, every step is handled with precision.
home.pillar3Text: Confidential transactions, considered advice, long-term trust.
home.pillar4Text: Yachts, boats and properties selected for quality, location and character.

villas.title: Villas & Apartments

about.title: About KBC Yachting
about.subtitle: A family business at the heart of the Gulf of Saint-Tropez.
about.storyP1: KBC Yachting is a family company specialised in the sale of new and pre-owned boats, as well as day and weekly charter.
about.storyP2: Based in Port-Grimaud, we accompany sellers and buyers through to navigation title registration. We handle everything for our owners, with the rigour and discretion this craft demands.
about.storyP3: Our knowledge of the territory — from the Gulf of Saint-Tropez to the wider Mediterranean — guides every recommendation, whether afloat or ashore.
about.presenceText: Office in Port-Grimaud, at the heart of the French Riviera. Local roots for an international clientele.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project, in confidence.
contact.formSuccessText: We will reply as soon as possible.

footer.tagline: House of brokerage · Gulf of Saint-Tropez
